config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:StaticList { ListID: event.after.ListID, ItemID: event.after.ItemID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:StaticList { ListID: event.before.ListID, ItemID: event.before.ItemID }) SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:StaticList { ListID: event.before.ListID, ItemID: event.before.ItemID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
